title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: No player has scored more goals from outside the box than Liverpool’s Dominik Szoboszlai this season. All four of his strikes have been from direct free-kicks, with only David Beckham and Laurent Robert netting more in a single campaign. Only Jeremy Doku has had more successful dribbles in the Premier League this season than Brighton’s Yankuba Minteh.

title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. title: Auxerre vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Auxerre have won only one of their last nine matches in all competitions against Brest, a 3-0 home victory on 17 September 2024. Auxerre have failed to score in only one of their 13 home matches against Brest in Ligue 1, in May 2011.

title: MA Super Ligue 1
description: SoAnne is at the Parc des Princes for a special episode dedicated to Paris Saint-Germain and the 25th anniversary of PSG for Communities! For this weeks challenge, the Ligue 1+ team will have the pleasure of welcoming young aspiring reporter, Enzo. This weeks interview will take place live between Luis Enrique and Keen.

title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Nice have picked up 11 points against Paris SG in the last five Ligue 1 seasons ; only Monaco and Rennes have gained more against them over that period. Nice have picked up 10 points in the 10 Ligue 1 matches since Claude Puels appointment, which is the same amount as in the last 10 games managed by Franck Haise for les Aiglons in the top-flight.

title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Lyon and Monaco will face each other for the 119th time in Ligue 1, making it the second-most played fixture in the top-flights history. Only Saint-Étienne vs Bordeaux has been played more often in Ligue 1. None of the last 21 matches between Lyon and Monaco in all competitions have ended in a draw. The last draw between the two sides was in October 2015.

title: Olympique Marseille vs Lille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Marseille and Lille will face each other for the 116th time in Ligue 1, making it the joint-fifth most played fixture in the top-flight history. Marseille have won just one of their last 12 games against Lille in all competitions, a 2-1 win in Ligue 1 in September 2022. However, none of those five losses were at home.

title: EPL Stories 2025/2026
description: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

title: Paris FC vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Paris FC have lost just one of their last ten matches in all competitions against Le Havre, a 0-1 loss in Ligue 2 in February 2021. The last three meetings between these two sides have all ended goalless. Le Havre have been involved in the most 0-0 draws in Ligue 1 2025-26. They also recorded more goalless draws than any other team last season.

title: Rennes vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Rennes are on a run of eight consecutive wins against Metz in Ligue 1, their longest streak against a single opponent in the top-flight. Rennes have won six of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against teams currently in the bottom half of the table, after failing to win any of their first six this season.

title: Nantes vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Nantes have won just one of their last nine Ligue 1 matches against Strasbourg, losing each of the last four. Nantes have failed to win any of their last six home Ligue 1 matches against Strasbourg, after winning 11 of the previous 12.

title: Lens vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
description: Lens have won each of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Angers and could set their longest ever winning streak against the same opponent in the top-flight. Lens have lost only two of their last 21 home Ligue 1 games against Angers, in August 1993 and November 2020.

title: Final - Day 11 - ATP 1000 Miami Open presented by Itaú
description: Held at Hard Rock Stadium, the Miami Open uses Laykold hard courts, playing noticeably faster than Indian Wells. Heat, humidity, and night sessions influence match dynamics, while the tournament traditionally produces long matches and physical battles as players complete the Sunshine Double.

title: Jannik SINNER (ITA) vs Daniil Medvedev - Final - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
description: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.
